data.title: Fastenal Company declares a dividend of $0.22 per share to be paid on November 25, 2025, for shareholders of record on October 28, 2025.
data.description: WINONA, Minn.--Fastenal Company (Nasdaq: FAST) announced a dividend of $0.22 per share to be paid on November 25, 2025, to shareholders of record as of October 28, 2025. Dollar amounts in this statement are in millions. The board of directors declared the dividend, adjusting share-related details due to a two-for-one stock split previously announced.

data.title: Orion Properties Inc. (NYSE: ONL) to release Q3 2025 earnings on Nov 6, 2025. Real estate trust to announce results.
data.description: Phoenix-based real estate investment trust Orion Properties Inc. (NYSE: ONL) disclosed plans to unveil its operating figures for the third quarter concluded on September 30, 2025, following the market closure on November 6, 2025. Orion, the owner of a range of single-tenant net lease office properties across the U.S., will present its diversified portfolio data. The announcement also includes details about a webcast and conference call, providing an avenue for stakeholders to engage with the company's performance figures.

data.title: Primaris REIT closes $565M acquisition of Promenades St-Bruno from Cadillac Fairview in Montreal.
data.description: Primaris Real Estate Investment Trust has successfully completed the acquisition of a 100% interest in Promenades St-Bruno in Montreal, Quebec from Cadillac Fairview for a total of $565.0 million. The transaction, initially announced on October 6, 2025, was finalized on October 10, 2025. This deal, subject to standard closing conditions, has now been entirely satisfied or waived.

data.title: IRT (NYSE: IRT) sets Q3 2025 earnings release for Oct 29 post-market close; conference call on Oct 30 at 9:00 a.m. ET. Phone: (888) 440-3307.
data.description: Independence Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: IRT) has disclosed the schedule for discussing its third quarter 2025 financial results. The results will be released on Wednesday, October 29, 2025, after the market closes. The management will host a conference call on Thursday, October 30, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. For those within the U.S., the telephone number to join the call is (888) 440-3307, with the Conference ID (Passcode): 1963990. This live conference call will provide insights and analysis on the financial performance of IRT.

data.title: Installed Building Products releases 2025 ESG report, reaffirming commitment to sustainability and showcasing achievements from the past year.
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, Installed Building Products, Inc. (IBP) (NYSE: IBP), a top installer of insulation and related building products, disclosed the launch of its 2025 Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) report. This report emphasizes the Company’s dedication to ESG principles and showcases notable accomplishments over the past year. IBP's commitment to environmental sustainability, employee well-being, and community engagement is underlined in the report, reinforcing IBP's ongoing efforts in these areas.

data.title: Stocks tumble as S&P 500 drops over 2% for the first time in 6 months, following Trump's China tariff threat.
data.description: The S&P 500 experienced a significant drop of over 2%, marking the first decline of this magnitude in half a year. This sudden decrease has unsettled investors who had been enjoying a prolonged period of growth.

BARDELLA, FROM FRANCE'S FAR-RIGHT NATIONAL RALLY PARTY, SAYS HIS PARTY WILL VOTE DOWN LECORNU GOVERNMENT

data.title: EquipmentShare opened new branch in Georgia, part of $185M statewide expansion, creating up to 148 jobs; total 14 locations.
data.description: EquipmentShare, a rapidly growing construction-technology and equipment-rental company, has launched a new branch in Richmond Hill, Georgia, showcasing a major step in its statewide expansion. With a remarkable $185 million investment in Georgia, the company anticipates generating around 148 job opportunities and elevating its presence in the state to 14 locations. Noteworthy figures from the inauguration event include state and local representatives coming together with EquipmentShare's leadership for a ribbon-cutting ceremony at the new 161 T location.

data.title: Coca-Cola Consolidated, Inc. declares $0.25 per share dividend for Q4 2025, payable on Nov. 7 to stockholders of record by Oct. 24.
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina on October 10, 2025, Coca-Cola Consolidated, Inc. (NASDAQ: COKE) disclosed the approval of a dividend for the last quarter of 2025 amounting to $0.25 per share for both Common Stock and Class B Common Stock. This dividend is set to be disbursed on November 7, 2025, to shareholders recorded by the business close on October 24, 2025.

data.title: Mesabi Trust declares $0.34 distribution per Unit, down from $0.39 last year. Payable on Nov 20 to Unitholders of record.
data.description: In New York, the Trustees of Mesabi Trust (NYSE:MSB) have announced a distribution of $0.34 per Unit of Beneficial Interest to be paid on November 20, 2025, for Mesabi Trust Unitholders recorded as of October 30, 2025. This amount is lower than the $0.39 per Unit distributed during the same period in the previous year. The recent announcement reflects a decrease in distribution compared to the previous year.

data.title: IonQ joins ComoLake2025 in Italy for digital innovation. Niccolò de Masi, IonQ CEO, to give keynote.
data.description: IonQ, a top quantum company listed as IONQ on the NYSE, unveiled its involvement in the ComoLake2025 Digital Innovation Forum, a major tech event in Italy emphasizing digital transformation and infrastructure. Scheduled from October 14 to 17 at the Villa Erba International Exhibition and Congress Center in Cernobbio, the forum will feature Niccolò de Masi, IonQ's Chairman and CEO, delivering a keynote address. This event is significant for IonQ as it showcases their commitment to innovation and participation in global tech gatherings.

data.title: IonQ to showcase quantum advances at GITEX Dubai 2025 on Oct 13-17. Accelerating quantum tech adoption for enterprises.
data.description: IonQ, a prominent quantum company trading as IONQ on NYSE, revealed its involvement in GITEX Global 2025, a notable tech exhibition occurring from October 13 to 17 at the Dubai World Trade Centre. The event aims to showcase improvements in quantum computing and secure infrastructure that drive business adoption of quantum technologies. IonQ executives and partners will feature advancements in commercial applications to expedite this adoption process. Rima Alameddine, the Chief Revenue Officer, will be part of the delegation.
France's PM Lecornu: All issues can be debated in Parliament.

data.title: Canada Meats opens store in Etobicoke, celebrating Thanksgiving with 1,000 FREE turkey giveaway event on Oct 12, 2025.
data.description: A Canadian halal butcher, Canada Meats, will open its first location in Etobicoke this Thanksgiving. To celebrate, they are hosting a 1,000 Turkey Giveaway on October 12, 2025, at 12 Stoffel Drive, Toronto. The event will run from 12:00pm to 4:00pm, with turkeys available on a first come, first served basis or while supplies last. Canada Meats focuses on providing premium halal beef, chicken, and lamb to its customers.
US bank deposits rose to $18.522 trln from $18.421 trln in prior week

data.title: MidWestOne Financial Group (Nasdaq: MOFG) to announce Q3 2025 financial results on Oct. 23, with a conference call on Oct. 24.
data.description: In Iowa City, Iowa, on October 10, 2025, MidWestOne Financial Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: MOFG) revealed that it will unveil its third quarter financial report for 2025 post-market closure on Thursday, October 23, 2025. As the parent entity of MidWestOne Bank, MidWestOne will conduct a conference call at 11:00 a.m. Central Time on Friday, October 24, 2025, to deliberate on its financial performance.

data.title: Credicorp Ltd celebrates 30 years on NYSE, aims for ROE of 19.5% and C/I ratio near 42% in 3-4 years at Investor Day.
data.description: Key points from the investor day presentation include a focus on transformation, innovation, and maintaining strong Total Shareholder Return (TSR) throughout economic cycles. The company is targeting a sustainable Return on Equity (ROE) of 19.5% and a Cost/Income (C/I) ratio close to 42% over the next three to four years.

data.title: Norwood Financial Corp (NWFL) to release Q3 earnings on October 22 at 9AM; call details at ir.wayne.bank.
data.description: Norwood Financial Corp, trading as NWFL, has scheduled its third-quarter earnings call for October 22nd at 9:00 AM. Those interested can find further details at ir.wayne.bank.

data.title: Solitron Devices, Inc. shares fiscal 2026 Q2 results, pleasing the Company. Oct. 10, 2025 news.
data.description: Solitron Devices, headquartered in West Palm Beach, Florida, disclosed their fiscal 2026 second quarter results on October 10, 2025. The company, traded under the ticker symbol SODI on OTC Pink, reported positive financial outcomes for this period.
